body:
| | |

| Hey team, It's time for a numbers update. Check this out: [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191028_AD_20191028-fr-AD-ActBlue-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Now we're slowing down, but I know this grassroots community can help make up the difference. Make sure we don't miss our $725,000 end-of-month goal. **[Our average online donation today is $19.06 -- can you donate right now to help us get back on track? Every single dollar helps get us closer to goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191028_AD_20191028-fr-AD-ActBlue-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'll be keeping a close eye on the numbers. When I look at them tomorrow, I hope we'll all be happy with what we see. Thanks for stepping up,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. name: Yang2020
subject: We’re counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2312%2E377263%2EO042dG) Yang Gang --

If we don’t hit our goal in 3 days, here’s what will happen:
* We can’t go up on TV in key states.
* We can’t invest in more digital ads and raise Andrew’s name ID.
* And we can’t compete with the other candidates that have long lists of wealthy donors.

But with your help, we can hit our goal and put ourselves in a good position to change the dynamics of this race. [Can you make a contribution of $10 now when it matters most? Please, give all you can now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15307?t=5&akid=2312%2E377263%2EO042dG) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/15307?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2312%2E377263%2EO042dG)

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: BREAKING: Georgia Secretary of State plans to purge 330,000 voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Raffensperger intends to purge roughly 330,000 voters from the rolls before the 2020 primary takes place. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037bec/3259435801/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Hours ago, the Atlanta Journal-Constitution reported that Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger intends to purge roughly 330,000 voters from the rolls before the 2020 primary takes place. Raffensperger seems committed to following in the footsteps of his predecessor, Governor* Brian Kemp, the architect of voter suppression who made a name for himself as Secretary of State by removing Georgia voters from the rolls and making it harder to cast a ballot. Given the long history of voter suppression in the Georgia Secretary of State's office, Raffensperger has a responsibility to guarantee that not a single voter is wrongly included on the purge list. Fair Fight is committed to holding the Secretary of State's office accountable and conducting our own efforts to notify voters so they can take the necessary steps to stay on the rolls. But doing so will take resources. [**Will you chip in today to protect the constitutional rights of voters?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037bed/3259435801/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE102819PURGE") Last November, Fair Fight Action filed a federal lawsuit against the state of Georgia that directly challenged the state's practice of "use it or lose it" voting purging. And in March, Fair Fight Action's lawyers will head to trial in order to defend our democracy. For eight years, Kemp oversaw the systematic dismantling of our democracy and of voting rights in Georgia. We cannot let his legacy of silencing Georgia voters continue unchallenged. \- Team Fair Fight
---
**[donate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037bed/3259435801/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE102819PURGE")**

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037bea/3259435801/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037beb/3259435801/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa57e/34a064cc/1b262db4/7037be8/3259435801/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc853/3eb3e2fc/55ce509e/744daad2/2268171914/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191028_em_adv_cc&source=20191028_em_adv_cc")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc853/3eb3e2fc/55ce509e/744daad1/2268171914/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191028_em_adv_cc&source=20191028_em_adv_cc"). Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc853/3eb3e2fc/55ce509e/744daad0/2268171914/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191028_em_adv_cc&source=20191028_em_adv_cc"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: "What about Us?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I’ve seen New Hampshire’s beauty and "Iowa nice” -- and in the process, **learned the policies that will help bring this country back together.**
**“Training for a Lifetime”** in which skills are acquired and re-acquired throughout one’s life in the labor force (the states' 2.5% and 2.4% unemployment rates would be 7.6% and 6.2% if those who lost jobs and now lack the skills to get another were included).
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11322512/115185574/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&refcode=em102919pink)
On the heels of hundreds of rural "for-profit" **hospitals** closing, another 20% of those rural hospitals are expected to close. Yet the Medicare-for-all policies proposed by many candidates will rely upon for-profit hospitals! We need to begin testing publicly-run hospitals like the VA for the areas that are being abandoned.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11322514/115185577/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&refcode=em102919pink)
Annually, we only have half as many **small business start-ups** as years ago. Small businesses create 70% of all new jobs. We need new tax credits to incentivize investment in small businesses.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11322515/115185579/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&refcode=em102919pink)
These are policies that help all Americans, particularly in rural areas — but we are not talking about them. No wonder why Trump supporters (and plenty of Clinton supporters) identify with my fellow Pennsylvanian P!nk’s song, “**What about us?”**
Please support my effort to bring these policies to America as **a President who walks in the shoes of all Americans.**
Warmest regards, Joe
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11322516/115185580/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&refcode=em102919pink)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11322517/115185581/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&emci=e7618fec-53fa-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=079936a1-5afa-e911-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
and get involved in these challenging and wonderful times.

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e7618fec-53fa-e911-828b-2818784d6d68/079936a1-5afa-e911-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5MzZhMS01YWZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CSUo2hj8EY2wgh82taM6I-gT2Ukvg7xdSdC0amdMmM=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

McConnell proudly calls himself the "Grim Reaper" and openly brags about killing efforts to combat climate change and improve our health care.
**But McConnell is THE most unpopular Senator up for re-election.** He's the only Senator in the entire country where **50% or more of his constituents disapprove of him.**
That's why 314 Action is going up with ads in Kentucky to remind voters about McConnell's extremism and help Amy McGrath defeat him.
[](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_mcgrath19?refcode=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3")

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44ff/4bd7760e/44944c00/77ade2e4/2352277434/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb44ff/4bd7760e/44944c00/77ade2e3/2352277434/VEsHAw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=16+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3&source=314_EM_FR_191029_DefeatMcConnell_U2_X3")

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

body:
Peter,

I’m so grateful — so many community members have shown up to volunteer, eager to help us with our ramped-up campaign.
But our volunteers need your support to reach every corner of IL-03.

We need to raise another $6,000 for our Fall Organizing Fund before the end of the month to keep our volunteers out in the field, spreading our message.

Can you rush a grassroots contribution now to help us reach our goal? name: Jason Yates
subject: Planned Parenthood's $45 million plan - why you should take notice
body:
Hi Peter,
I hope this email finds you well and alerts you to something you may have missed in the news. Planned Parenthood recently announced their largest investment ever in the 2020 election cycle - an astounding $45 million to back pro-abortion candidates.
Should we be surprised? Planned Parenthood isn’t focused on women’s health (something we’ve all known for quite a while). Their number one goal is profit, and they’re taking the lives of babies to make it happen.
They know the only way to secure their future is to defeat President Trump and gain a pro-abortion majority in Congress.
Peter, this should make you, and every Christian in America, stand up and take notice. Let’s not forget exactly who Planned Parenthood is and what this group is doing according to the investigative work done by Live Action.
* Lying about abortion-related complications to vulnerable women
* Securing secret abortions for underage sex slaves
* Participating in covering up child sexual abuse and concealing the identity of abusers
* Supporting sex-selective abortions
* Accepting abortion money from racist donors to abort black babies

They are laser-focused on one thing - to generate abortion sales. Every 90-seconds a baby is aborted at a Planned Parenthood facility. Let that sink in for a moment.
Is this what you want your tax dollars funding? Is this the nation you want? I know it’s not.
But millions of Christians sit on the sidelines, sipping their sweet ice tea, unaware of the power of their vote -- we have to awaken them to take action.
Planned Parenthood will spend millions of dollars in Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin to make sure President Trump does not return to the Oval Office.
It’s disappointing that votes to fund Planned Parenthood have fallen along partisan lines, but as it stands, Planned Parenthood knows they need to pick up only four seats in the Senate to gain a pro-abortion majority.
Peter, I’m writing this note to ask you to [help take on the agenda of Planned Parenthood by donating](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191024apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191029apl01nd&n=1) any amount to help fund our 2020 campaign to get Christians to vote. Even if it’s just $5, you will make a difference, and your money will be put to good use.
When you donate to My Faith Votes, you make our strategy possible to target these swing states and motivate Christians to vote for life.
We are utilizing all the latest technology to locate Christian voters, reach them through media, door-to-door efforts, peer-to-peer texting, and church outreach efforts.
Planned Parenthood is working overtime to secure the future of its evil cash-making corporation at the expense of children’s lives.
But I believe the full power of the Christian influence has yet to be fully unleashed. You can make this possible by donating today.
When you donate, you’re linking arms with thousands of other Christians who’ve stepped up to do the same, and together through our efforts and our prayers, we can take on the evil of Planned Parenthood.
I hope you won’t delay. The 2020 efforts are underway now. Will you consider making a gift towards this urgent need to protect life in 2020 and for the future of our nation?
Thank you, my friend. I appreciate you!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p191024apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191029apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191029apl01nd&n=3)
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191029apl01nd&n=4).

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: This headline is good, but it gets better when you read the full article.
body:
"In Maine, Sen. Susan Collins..."
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc2/4bef7a87/6b3cb3cd/287fc6dc/321380468/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends, this headline is good:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc2/4bef7a87/6b3cb3cd/287fc6d3/321380468/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-a")
And it only gets better when you read the full article.
_**" In Maine, Sen. Susan Collins (R) looks to be in for the most serious race of her two-plus decade career as former state House Speaker Sara Gideon reported raising more than $3 million dollars over the past three months..."**_
Our campaign is off to an incredibly strong start. But Mitch McConnell and Collins' special interest backers are reading this same news, and they're getting ready to spend whatever it takes to keep this Senate seat for Republicans.
That's why we can't sit back, even for a moment. And it's why we have to ask:
[**Chip in $3 before our end-of-month deadline hits this Thursday at midnight. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so our ability to keep pushing ahead comes down to you. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc2/4bef7a87/6b3cb3cd/287fc6d3/321380468/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-a")
Control of the Senate is at stake. Neither side can afford to lose this seat. We have to come through.
All our best,
Team Sara

name: Rhianon DeLeeuw
subject: You're personally invited
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U
body:
Open invitation to an exciting event.

|
---
| Friend,

I'm Rhianon DeLeeuw, wife of Arkansas U.S. Senate Candidate Josh Mahony.

I'm personally inviting you to a virtual dialogue with Cortney Tunis, Executive Director of Pantsuit Nation, on her vision of the world today through the lens of Pantsuit Nation on Tuesday, November 5, 6 P.M. to 7 P.M. CST. [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d5c/382d5bd5/738a26b/3b075a52/3864324538/VEsH/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr?refcode=ev191029psn") Cortney will be joining us virtually and participants can join virtually (virtual link will be sent after ticket purchase).

Tickets are only $25, and you must register in advance to receive the link after purchase.

**You can purchase a ticket here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d5c/382d5bd5/738a26b/3b075a52/3864324538/VEsE/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr?refcode=ev191029psn")**

Cortney Tunis is an outspoken champion of diverse leadership across the world of nonprofits. She has worked in the arts, higher education, executive search, and currently runs Pantsuit Nation - an online organization that builds community to encourage civic participation.

She loves learning and talking about how new technologies can enhance classic organizing and communicating practices. She is a food motivated travel junkie, and a daughter, sister, and aunt, and she can't wait to speak with you.

**You can purchase a ticket here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d5c/382d5bd5/738a26b/3b075a52/3864324538/VEsF/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jmpnfr?refcode=ev191029psn")**

Hope you're there, Rhianon DeLeeuw
---
---

PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U.S. SENATE

Mahony for Senate
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States

name: Congressman Paul Gosar

So I hope I have earned your support. It is important to me to have you on my team and if you agree, [I humbly ask for a donation to our campaign of $25, $50, $250, $500?](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAPWS1xg_KARTkWId7I-6nIT1cPzHAQAAAELdWmFjipk94DIWtlPxPX8D6TAkQdGAPUF0zcO6haUx9uqT8QHQ6Vpg0HqqWlEyfjscWvYlGsRF45MPEO9C6vNGEgw2XcgyT8ytJLno5bcEGvzvYYyWj5hAybuy3UUZR5Q0v1aoObQQFOJq9w1dDjkmjL2g71c3X9G6jE5mSzyAOzdPtwT8fAaLSUkOxdviZO7tZT7x23X_RAjUL_2UD65-Oao57u1pKl9ISLsNuCdQCaT6dWwODBR97G6u7ZYw3qPaqtBSbf6GOcKel7ToDvc9z3OHQPMDXa6BGkuHIqmxLwqNbud8tvJ8kM6HeqTDZQ)The next election is a fight for the soul of our nation and I’m ready to fight.Sincerely, Paul GosarP.S. - If you aren’t already, follow me on [Twitter](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAE9odPm2tOO32tfUtnS1EtLR3if8AQAAAELdWmFjipk94DIWtlPxPX8D6TAkQdGAPUF0zcO6haUx9uqT8QHQ6Vpg0HqqWlEyfjscWvYlGsRF45MPEO9C6vNGEgw2XcgyT8ytJLno5bcEGvzvYYyWj5hAybuy3UUZRzemqU6ATGQOWD1tPLl-rHU-0C8d_DaltfuzbeabcRIH91IbVN1Ij2tS6Px_Cve0mWaPw7HAbIve6YSDH3bGVIl9yEyioc-SzNE0MxAvkdXy7hed6Ze4oVsOAMCw1imSrqafYXw23uIj3_tPI7QN2IU) and [Facebook](http://event.a1e0.squarespace-mail.com/?ref=I2UAAB1eAeL792XZjbMpiSr3J7xFEqlgAQAAAELdWmFjipk94DIWtlPxPX8D6TAkQdGAPUF0zcO6haUx9uqT8QHQ6Vpg0HqqWlEyfjscWvYlGsRF45MPEO9C6vNGEgw2XcgyT8ytJLno5bcEGvzvYYyWj5hAybuy3UUZR2nAQ9zyFzJy_snNBkKfKvYfR9uP_SlzmNFRsdhJUamKCJUVeiSf_N2qqqEJ0sZrvP8J8cdTQ0ABi0J-EEhYBhykZIBuhLN1bungTZ5C9NqZne6aF0nVq3wr5bPbRXsYIKcMueQjKuapanu57kxkj_aqFDct5CgIg_mmFVxzrYfh)!

In less than one week my campaign will be facing a make or break moment and honestly, I’m getting nervous I may have to wave the white flag. **[You see, I’m still behind my October fundraising goal and if I don’t raise an additional $35,000 before midnight –](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b23bb0b77dfd4062b1f17527fb37baed&_e=0DWoKuKttMjEkB7YMNfjRCqCQ1IT612j-zSCVBt3fv3gQl-P1kLZxre14SBQo8RWaKlal6LHLeWnKDjbZfhY2jw7J-r4iloAAYzIe53R85tPfgvpAd2pPOnTw4T3kC8krfmwk6v1n7BVD2HQWAydAgf_Mue8v6Cz2Rby13x0wRWpVxpsF6i857GpZ1dwFzoe6V0iZ9ucVhvKgT-kxH76ccEPJsaLHsayjIVsdXCj3fGo1y7OY3DRIWq-LZEI93K4i6xNbvovQ5Ty98hDp_uGTqFvU5zB2RjB23O-ZNl-3u4OqAeeEdNwEJ3cUhy46zSoBBdpEtYkswC1TTHQICfR4MKZatD4cePkCRNeDqsWmzBp-YSd6GvkejzRu_noSwQttmWAt16UGKyK3DF83u1hnQ%3D%3D)** this race is officially over for me.

It takes a lot to rock me, but the stakes this election are too high to play it cool. **[Would you consider supporting my America First campaign by donating $10, $25, $50, $100 or even more before midnight?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b23bb0b77dfd4062b1f17527fb37baed&_e=0DWoKuKttMjEkB7YMNfjRCqCQ1IT612j-zSCVBt3fv3gQl-P1kLZxre14SBQo8RWaKlal6LHLeWnKDjbZfhY2jw7J-r4iloAAYzIe53R85tPfgvpAd2pPOnTw4T3kC8krfmwk6v1n7BVD2HQWAydAgf_Mue8v6Cz2Rby13x0wRWpVxpsF6i857GpZ1dwFzoevjLl2jpbRwoJXaZAgFME-UfE8mRP4sH5-xOaNe54WbaoxMricxsDc94NnRdmBWDlEfdmC8iQuaEzdLdemWAUdbeKfDvcFm2RCwwdBUeYXZG_k3A87M9bYHbVmejha2wtsah6bzkvg3tdXNtVKo5DHL69JFizB7K5-pXGvBYozHTz5mhkIoReTgv4ZRD5PxJN33lF-c32R5RvVBJaa8Ie0w%3D%3D)**
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE ➩ ➩**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b23bb0b77dfd4062b1f17527fb37baed&_e=0DWoKuKttMjEkB7YMNfjRCqCQ1IT612j-zSCVBt3fv3gQl-P1kLZxre14SBQo8RWaKlal6LHLeWnKDjbZfhY2jw7J-r4iloAAYzIe53R85tPfgvpAd2pPOnTw4T3kC8krfmwk6v1n7BVD2HQWAydAgf_Mue8v6Cz2Rby13x0wRWpVxpsF6i857GpZ1dwFzoeoKK4_KZaqwvzfIDYaqabMT_IQ8ZQxnA5awLJZHlBhiKYMTEi5B-6LZIjSOOAMttsEIzoCq84g3qetHcQt9Z2ODWiG9mezw829kp1DmGQZ9wBE1C1OBX7oPI7Br2vPLqZQfbam0KhD2rn_V3MjAcS_ujzUZUgDFQiiHtA-7dMCQhzOmMSsDBoH3SODE02K_IPHRodYZXK1d27mw4Ewrqy1g%3D%3D)
---

As the Sheriff of Maricopa County for over two decades, I had a front row seat to the dangers facing our communities _each and every day._

While Democrats continue their calls for amnesty, open borders, and sanctuary cities I’m preparing to win this race and get back to work. That means **locking up** violent criminals, human traffickers, and gang members who, oh by the way, **_enter our country illegally._**

Friend, the **status quo** is unacceptable. **[But in order for me to continue my fight against the D.C. Swamp and ending the immigration crisis plaguing our country, I need to hear from you.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b23bb0b77dfd4062b1f17527fb37baed&_e=0DWoKuKttMjEkB7YMNfjRCqCQ1IT612j-zSCVBt3fv3gQl-P1kLZxre14SBQo8RWaKlal6LHLeWnKDjbZfhY2jw7J-r4iloAAYzIe53R85tPfgvpAd2pPOnTw4T3kC8krfmwk6v1n7BVD2HQWAydAgf_Mue8v6Cz2Rby13x0wRWpVxpsF6i857GpZ1dwFzoevmNEj9A1qX9twgcrP3Zus6qBMNzFdnxwHMQkuUUU_eMrQ93eiXwTcTDR_bFR6q7AqBscEUyuEVRO8ltqTqVX-6kyfBCluAbdMVFDNfMQz0PtYpa9sod7NZy2CNblsVECWN3cLXXi5YLumG2Czgc8RQdFIN9Qugdzw0IGVPAfKbcZ1RK04Gqz9gFTUClrvnskBuSNswMf8cybvXeE4vdv6w%3D%3D)**

I still need to raise $35,000 before midnight. **[Can I count you in?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=b23bb0b77dfd4062b1f17527fb37baed&_e=0DWoKuKttMjEkB7YMNfjRCqCQ1IT612j-zSCVBt3fv3gQl-P1kLZxre14SBQo8RWaKlal6LHLeWnKDjbZfhY2jw7J-r4iloAAYzIe53R85tPfgvpAd2pPOnTw4T3kC8krfmwk6v1n7BVD2HQWAydAgf_Mue8v6Cz2Rby13x0wRWpVxpsF6i857GpZ1dwFzoeQGIHwhskHnQJ1sgb4VKnCyYlxer7WjucHTPCGYJ8mZe_POdBniR79NPjh6etOuetpl8-m7Mh_mOt6UfJ4Jbtjb184yMhcKBbG_QuJJuF1l6t6AEDCb00uw-AOV63Cjgyws3l7P9cU5BED22RgQ_F4trFsieoGDYA28q7dtlAIo4iUGWgNInLK1yDLG8b-DXiyULCJYpp5_Q3uOLLpaAsvQ%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

subject: Not an email I wanted to send this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| _**We 're falling behind on our end-of-month goal and need you to step up right now to get us back on track. [Can you chip in today?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AD_20191029-fr-AD-fallingshort-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ I'll be honest, team. The news isn't good. **I 'm seeing our latest numbers and we are not where we need to be.** We're running out of time to hit our $725,000 goal. If we fall short -- _even for one day_ \-- that makes it that much harder for us to catch up. **We did the math and if 4,119 donors chip in our average donation of $22 every day from now until Thursday, we'll reach our goal.** **[Can we count on you to pitch in $22 (or whatever you can) right now? We need you and 4,118 others to step up today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AD_20191029-fr-AD-fallingshort-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I believe in this team. I've seen what can happen when we unite around goals that seemed unachievable. It was only a month ago that we had to raise $1.7 million to keep Cory's voice in this race. In fact, we raised _over_ $2 million because of people like you. As I write to you, we have another end-of-month goal in front of us and a big donor threshold we need to meet to qualify for the December debate. I know this probably seems like a pattern now -- and it is. Simply put, we need to raise enough money to keep this campaign running strong and we have to ensure Cory's spot on the debate stage. **Falling short of our fundraising goal and losing Cory 's voice on the debate stage is not an option.** At the end of the day, these are just two more obstacles on Cory's path to the White House. We've stepped up to meet these goals before and with your support we'll do it again. **Let 's make it happen: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AD_20191029-fr-AD-fallingshort-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191029_AD_20191029-fr-AD-fallingshort-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. | Congressman Crenshaw has dedicated his life to serving our nation. A Navy SEAL who deployed overseas five times and was awarded two Bronze Stars and a Purple Heart for his bravery and sacrifice, Dan Crenshaw put his life on the line to keep America safe.
Now he is fighting for us in Congress, but he needs help. He needs allies to stand with him in the House of Representatives.
That's why I'm reaching out to my supporters to [join the effort to take back our congressional seat.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001SNbCprgA-p0-ylX08hi621kUT76JyURTccVTVVbxbIohTRovzkrfqKFO3BAIETJWpaQt7oM-6kIs7VGNG2Fh1guRFqHrMKr2y29k9AL7bdq9OiSnpr3TxmZpBTHzQMBp5TuIsaoqCxDTMbe__sPpIPdtK-IT-y4Zfe_17XA5xdLcxa-Zd5mvUlJdIv23IDsNlXJofuYtn9Xd0aUz-zJ_1g62NNoHaaRXhppnZX2c1x6nQVQjW-PLHOENAmsFKRboMjf8nhbqirRrdvy7JCFLetMiY_yRl8UddFIDIaZzV-EX4mKq3Nt1ojZspvCuSIpp7g7cz8Yul_FIPfjjTHNKww==&c=WWFnQ_Wq8tNC-RsRKd9SMb9XL_ydkzJjSUREOPBWbj4XJN-_7nHTUA==&ch=3uRU0ATJUG2AjxCvMMc0oOuo-Sh8rIVo3SHi1qSWv7ri89LsyXGKqA==)

clean_body: Not sure if you saw, but I had the privilege of catching up with a true American hero this month - Congressman Dan Crenshaw. | | | | | | == | Friend, Not sure if you saw, but I had the privilege of catching up with a true American hero this month - Congressman Dan Crenshaw. | == | Congressman Crenshaw has dedicated his life to serving our nation. A Navy SEAL who deployed overseas five times and was awarded two Bronze Stars and a Purple Heart for his bravery and sacrifice, Dan Crenshaw put his life on the line to keep America safe. Now he is fighting for us in Congress, but he needs help. He needs allies to stand with him in the House of Representatives. That's why I'm reaching out to my supporters to == | | | | | == | | | Will you help me join Dan Crenshaw in Washington to fight for our values? == ==, == == == == -Nicole | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | | == == == | | | | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL) | | | | Nicole for New York (FEDERAL) | PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306 | | Sent by mailto:nicole@nicoleforny.com

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What’s happening in Virginia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

There’s a critical election happening in Virginia next week.

Democrats have a real chance at winning control of both chambers of the
statehouse for the first time in 25 years. This kind of victory wouldn’t
just help Virginia pass more progressive policies — it would also send a
message to Donald Trump and Republicans that Democrats are fired up and
ready to fight for our beliefs.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41100?refcode=ema20191029-64204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh ]Will you split a donation with our campaign and the Virginia House &
Senate Democratic Caucuses so we can build momentum for Democrats this
election season and bring change to every corner of the country, starting
in Virginia?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41100?refcode=ema20191029-64204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh ]Contribute $3

I got my start in politics serving my community of El Paso as a City
Councilman. My time as a Councilman taught me that no matter how high or
low you are on the ballot — we all have roles to play when it comes to
fighting for a more fair, more just, and more equal progressive agenda.
Even before these issues were considered “common” in the Democratic party,
my fellow council members and I were fighting to legalize marijuana and
provide health benefits to partners of gay city employees.

While I was running for Senate, I was reminded of this truth when we
visited 254 counties in Texas and met local leaders all across the state
fighting for change in their own communities. They recognized that while
it’s important to elect Democrats who are willing to fight for us in
D.C. — our local legislators have a special duty to build change from the
ground up.

So, before Virginians finish voting next week, we must remember that even
though we are at a critical moment in this presidential election, we also
need to put resources into electing Democrats everywhere, up and down the
ballot.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41100?refcode=ema20191029-64204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh ]Will you please chip in $3 to support our campaign and
Virginia Democrats as they inch closer to flipping both chambers in this
historic election?

I hope you will help me in supporting our friends in Virginia.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41100?refcode=ema20191029-64204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191029footer&t=1023&refcode2=64204_444211_Ft1Eeh&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=64204%2E444211%2EFt1Eeh

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

We've got just two days left before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on October 31 (spooky, right?).

It's powerfully important that we hit this month's goal. These fundraising targets are how we set budgets for opening new offices, hiring more organizers, hosting town halls, and more in these crucial months ahead.

**That's why we're thanking everyone who steps up in this critical moment with a free "Warren" bumper sticker.**

[**We wouldn't ask if it weren't urgent: Can Elizabeth count on you to make your first donation today and help hit this goal? >
We're proud of where this movement is right now, and it's all been possible because of grassroots donors chipping in $2 at a time.

This goal is important because we need real resources right now to keep growing our movement all the way to November 2020 -- and make all of the investments needed to win this race and spark big, structural change in our country.

We're counting on supporters from Pennsylvania making their first donation today to hit this goal and help power our movement forward.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc856/3eb3e2fc/55d84aae/744db428/3704524853/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc856/3eb3e2fc/55d84aae/744db417/3704524853/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc856/3eb3e2fc/55d84aae/744db416/3704524853/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

body:
---
| | **[_A beloved president asked you to step up and help flip the Senate. Will you answer President Obama 's call before the end-of-month deadline in 48 hours? Rush $5 to elect Ben Ray and DEFEAT McConnell's Republican Senate! >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b1_oav_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** **FIRST:**
President Obama called us to action in a powerful way. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b1_oav_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Democrats stepped up -- and Republicans started to panic.

If just 1,837 more Democrats step up for Ben Ray before his end-of-month deadline, he'll WIN his critical Senate race and OUST McConnell's Senate.

Will you step up with $5 before the deadline?

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b454/18e32a7f/538de50f/7b231729/162500009/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b454/18e32a7f/538de50f/7b23172e/162500009/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Matt Gaetz
subject: REMINDER: Join Donald Trump Jr. and Congressman Matt Gaetz for "Triggered" Book Signing
body:
Hi Friends-

I want to
personally invite you to a book signing event with my good friend
Donald Trump Jr. He'll be signing his new book, "Triggered" and
he's ready to help Make Northwest Florida Great Again. The event
will be held in the Linkside Ballroom at the Sandestin Resort
from 9:30 a.m. to 12 p.m.

Linkside
Ballroom at the Sandestin Resort

Friday,
November 8th: 9:30 a.m. to 12 p.m.

Address:
9300 Emerald Coast Parkway

Miramar
Beach, FL 33550

If you
haven't already signed up, space is limited--sign up for tickets
here today!
RSVP
To find
out more about his book, go to TriggeredBook.com. I look forward
to seeing you there!

Best,

Matt
Gaetz

Paid by Friends of Matt Gaetz

subject: 📆 early morning meeting tomorrow

body:
| |
---
| Team,

We have an early meeting with Ed tomorrow to update him on our progress for our October goal, and right now, we need to raise $35,000 before October 31.

End-of-month goals are huge indicators of our grassroots strength. Hitting our deadline goal will show everyone that our people-powered movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is unstoppable.

**And with Congressman Joe Kennedy III challenging Ed and his progressive agenda, we 're facing two opponents, and we can't fall short of this end-of-month goal.**

_**[Will you rush $27 to help us reach this week's goal and have Ed's back?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: _

_**[Donate $10 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=EM-102919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $27 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=EM-102919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $50 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=EM-102919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $100 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-102919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate $250 now](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=EM-102919_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate another amount](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
It's critical to keep Ed fighting on the frontlines for the issues that matter most to you.

Every day Donald Trump is making it clear that he has no interest in serving the American people. He's using the White House to benefit his personal, business, and political priorities.

But Ed has been fighting back against Donald Trump's corruption from day one. And Ed won't stop until Trump is defeated.

_**[Help keep Ed in the fight for our values by pitching in $27 or more to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102919_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks,

Team Markey

name: admin@maggiehassan.com
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We emailed yesterday because we needed to raise $6,500 to get our October fundraising back on track. Reason being that our projections say that's what we needed to do to protect New Hampshire's vulnerable Democratic Senate seat. The bad news is that we didn't make it.
Look, we just pulled the data and we still really need you to step up.
Climate change, action on gun safety, and abortion rights are all on the line -- and they could go down the drain if we lose this seat. [**Will you please click here to be one of the four donations we need from 03264 to make up ground? Any amount would be really, really helpful.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3dc/2a380d31/3d5d48cd/f0ec98/4059646211/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTAyOV8xMDE0bWlkbW9udGgyLXJzXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191029_1014midmonth2-rs_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Jordan Overstreet
subject: FWD: The stakes in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
When the stakes are this high, it's more important than ever to lead with your values and your principles. And that's exactly why I'm in this race.
|
---
Did you see Mike's email, friends? Our next big fundraising deadline is coming on Thursday night, and we need you to chip in to Mike's campaign. **[Can we count on you to chip in again before the fundraising deadline?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd01/4178530677/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191029_fr_em_topper")** This campaign is all about speaking the truth and talking to voters about what's on the line in this election. And we can continue to do that important work because of donors like you. **[So, if you can, make a contribution now before our end of month deadline on Thursday at midnight.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd01/4178530677/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191029_fr_em_topper")** Jordan Overstreet
Campaign Manager \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Franken
Date: October 28, 2019
Subject: The stakes in this election
| | Friends -- I'm in this race because I believe in America's 'small-d' democratic process and I believe that we have leaders who are letting our democracy degrade. **I 'm in this race because I believe we can turn things around.** I spent over 36 years in the Navy. As I advanced through the ranks, I learned how to spot a problem, develop a thoughtful strategy to improve it, and then execute that strategy. Whether at sea or posted ashore, I became adept at developing thoughtful strategies to fix what's broken, improve what's suboptimal, and perfect where feasible. Our strategy for this campaign has been three-fold:
* Lead with Iowa principles and values. Don't compromise.
* Speak the truth, no matter the polls.
* Listen to voters in every part of Iowa, from all walks of life.

**People are noticing our strategy -- and it's working.** We can right this ship. **But our strategy doesn 't work without you. [Can you chip in right now before our end of month deadline?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd02/4178530677/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191029_fr_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $10 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd03/4178530677/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191029_fr_em_express_lane_10")
---
[Donate $25 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd1c/4178530677/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20191029_fr_em_express_lane_25")
---
[Donate $50 now](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd1d/4178530677/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191029_fr_em_express_lane_50")
---
[Other Amount](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f247d/33365068/4a658635/3f8bbd1e/4178530677/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-october?refcode=20191029_fr_em_express_lane_other")
---
Very respectfully,
Mike Franken
|
---

---

clean_body: We need to fight back. We won't take a back seat to the Democrats as they attempt to destroy President Trump and overturn the will of the American people. That's why I joined Lindsey Graham today in condemning the "closed-door, illegitimate impeachment inquiry" lead by Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats. Don't want to receive our emails? | Friend – do you have 30 seconds? I hope you'll watch this quick message I recorded just for you! With less than 72 hours before the end of October, Senate Republicans currently only have a 4-seat majority in the United States Senate. With Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats' obsession with impeachment, it's now more important than ever that we protect a Republican majority in the Senate! There's so much riding on the 2020 elections. Thanks, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Martha McSally's Q3 fundraising numbers spell trouble for the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, GOP Senator Martha McSally released her third quarter fundraising numbers, and if we were her, we'd be worried for 2020. With all of her corporate PAC money and large dollar donors, she still managed to only raise about half as much as her Democratic opponent, former astronaut and Navy fighter pilot Mark Kelly. Kelly has been making serious headway in flipping this critical Senate seat blue, and Arizona voters are noticing \-- he's up 47 to 45 against McSally. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have all placed Martha McSally's Arizona seat firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws **_multiple times!_** We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb8/6e9863e8/15f93a52/1db08809/3972097077/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/KVQyddvS") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb8/6e9863e8/15f93a52/1db08809/3972097077/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/KVQyddvS") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb8/6e9863e8/15f93a52/1db08808/3972097077/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=OUT20191029a.ND-b&refcode2=gEF9aQHVbR6ezXjdaYfC")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Friend, can I ask you for a favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I want to talk to you about my good friend and colleague, Tina Smith.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029booker-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team, there's no question that Minnesota is going to be important in this election. In fact, it's why I'm writing to you about my good friend and colleague, Tina Smith.

Tina is one of the hardest working Senators we have. I admire Tina's commitment to service -- fighting for Minnesota and for all Americans. She's a tested public servant who understands the needs of Minnesotans and always puts them first. Nobody, not even the special interest groups wielding their influence in Washington, will change that.

**And Tina needs our help. Her opponent, Jason Lewis, is no stranger to the political cat and mouse game. He's part of the extreme right and is championed by President Trump, the RNC, dark-money groups, and the hundreds of millions of dollars they have at their disposal.**

**So here's the deal:** Tina still needs to raise $7,539 before midnight on Thursday. She needs to hit this goal in order to beat Lewis and stay in the Senate.

**[Tina needs our help. Please rush $10 before Thursday's midnight deadline so we can defend Minnesota's Senate seat.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029booker-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

_NBC_ recently listed Minnesota as one of the top five vulnerable Democratic seats. So I'm making sure everyone who supports Tina is committed to helping her win.

There's no question that Tina's is one of the most important Senate seats in 2020. And everything that we do now will determine whether Democrats win Minnesota, the Senate, and the White House. So if we're going to do it, Tina needs Democrats like you to step up now when she needs it most.

**[That's why I'm asking you to rush $10 now to support Tina before Thursday's deadline.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029booker-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you,

Cory | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029booker-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Why Legacy Media Are Freaking Out Over Baghdadi
body:
"It takes effort to try to spin the unalloyed good news of the Trump administration’s success [[against ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi] as a..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e35c1f6170&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Why Legacy Media Are Freaking Out Over Baghdadi**

“It takes effort to try to spin the unalloyed good news of the Trump administration’s success [against ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi] as a net negative, but corporate media were up for the challenge,” Mollie Hemingway writes for _The Federalist_.

There are 3 big reasons that publishers such as _The Washington Post_ quickly tried to change the story, according to Hemingway:
1. Positive News Coverage Hurts Media Efforts To Destroy Trump

2. ISIS Founder’s Death Complicates Media’s Syria Narrative

3. Trump Foreign Policy Successes Undermine Media Impeachment Drive

“It’s understandable some in the media want to destroy their political opponent, but they could do a better job of hiding their anger at achievements that are undoubtedly good for America and make the country safer.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=01825be558&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| With Washington’s compulsive habit of leaking, President Trump made the right call in keeping the mission against Baghdadi a closely held secret, Rep. Jim Banks (R-IN) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ccfaf6350&e=3ee4985eea). “Previous attempts to get al-Baghdadi have been foiled by leaks. In 2017, Gen. Tony Thomas explained how a leak to the New York Times foiled good intelligence that could have led to al-Baghdadi’s kill or capture.”
---
|
---
| “The S&P 500 closed at a record high Monday for the first time since July”—likely lifted by optimism about President Trump’s initial stage one trade deal with China, Melissa Quinn reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=349425606a&e=3ee4985eea). “This is a big win for jobs, 401-K’s, and, frankly, EVERYONE! Our Country is doing great,” President Trump tweeted.
---
|
---
| It’s been a long week—already—for Jeff Bezos and _The Washington Post._ After being heavily criticized for showing sympathy toward ISIS terrorist leader al-Baghdadi, now "a federal judge in Kentucky has reopened the $250 million defamation case filed [against _The Washington Post_] by a Covington Catholic student," Valerie Richardson reports for [_**The Washington Times**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=610dd9daeb&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: "It takes effort to try to spin the unalloyed good news of the Trump administration’s success [[against ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi] as a..." | | | | | | | Why Legacy Media Are Freaking Out Over Baghdadi “It takes effort to try to spin the unalloyed good news of the Trump administration’s success [against ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi] as a net negative, but corporate media were up for the challenge,” Mollie Hemingway writes for The Federalist. There are 3 big reasons that publishers such as The Washington Post quickly tried to change the story, according to Hemingway: 1. Positive News Coverage Hurts Media Efforts To Destroy Trump 2. ISIS Founder’s Death Complicates Media’s Syria Narrative 3. Trump Foreign Policy Successes Undermine Media Impeachment Drive “It’s understandable some in the media want to destroy their political opponent, but they could do a better job of hiding their anger at achievements that are undoubtedly good for America and make the country safer.” | | With Washington’s compulsive habit of leaking, President Trump made the right call in keeping the mission against Baghdadi a closely held secret, Rep. Jim Banks (R-IN) writes for . “Previous attempts to get al-Baghdadi have been foiled by leaks. In 2017, Gen. Tony Thomas explained how a leak to the New York Times foiled good intelligence that could have led to al-Baghdadi’s kill or capture.” | | “The S&P 500 closed at a record high Monday for the first time since July”—likely lifted by optimism about President Trump’s initial stage one trade deal with China, Melissa Quinn reports for the . “This is a big win for jobs, 401-K’s, and, frankly, EVERYONE! Our Country is doing great,” President Trump tweeted. | | It’s been a long week—already—for Jeff Bezos and The Washington Post. After being heavily criticized for showing sympathy toward ISIS terrorist leader al-Baghdadi, now "a federal judge in Kentucky has reopened the $250 million defamation case filed [against The Washington Post] by a Covington Catholic student," Valerie Richardson reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The ScumBagh is Dead!
body:
Over the weekend, the amazing men of our military pursued and killed the leader of ISIS, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351897-818523-4697936-8c88808c7a-6b489897fc)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351897-818523-4697935-ce251653be-6b489897fc) Over the weekend, the amazing men of our military pursued and killed the leader of ISIS, Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi.

Most Americans had never heard of Baghdadi until this past weekend. They weren't aware that this man was simply disgusting, evil, scum that deserved nothing less than what he faced at the hands of our fighting men and women.

This is the man who took 26 year-old American Kayla Mueller as his personal sex slave while directing terrorist activities around the world.

"ScumBagh" Baghdadi would literally crucify his victims, nailing them to a cross to mock Christianity while attempting to spread terror by filming others being burned alive, hacked or stoned to death.

So when President Trump told us of his fate, I was tearfully thankful.

The ScumBagh was chased down a tunnel by our heroic dogs of war as he whimpered and cried, until, like the coward that he was, he blew himself up.

The ScumBagh only killed himself and his own children --- so there was no martyrdom. Actually the opposite, as the Quran strictly forbids suicide.

All of America should be thankful for President Trump's leadership and the professionalism of our fighting forces.

But sadly that's not the case.

Jeff Bezos' _Washington Post_ published the headline referring to Baghdadi as an "austere religious scholar" in an attempt to glorify a demon.

And this morning, the _Washington Post_ , in a sick and unnecessary attempt to stir up controversy, pushed to release the identity of the war dog that was injured in the operation.

As with any pedigree dog, they have a trackable lineage that's likely attached to a family in Germany or the Netherlands (where the vast majority of military working dogs are purchased) -- a family that now has to put themselves on high alert because a Leftist reporter in Washington wants to hand their identity over to terrorists.

The _Washington Post_ is nothing more than the American version of Pravda - but in service to socialism.

I support President Trump's move to cancel all taxpayer dollars going to this publication and will do the same if elected to Congress.

If a copy of the _Washington Post_ were to end up in my Congressional office, I will literally file a complaint against Jeff Bezos for illegal dumping on public land.

Because that's what I think of the _Washington Post_ - **it is trash**.

But first, [**help me get to Washington by supporting my campaign today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351897-818523-4697935-ce251653be-6b489897fc).

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. As October comes to a close, we need to prove to the _Washington Post_ and the rest of the Fake News media that my campaign has sustained support. [**Help us close October strong by making a donation today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351897-818523-4697935-ce251653be-6b489897fc).

P.P.S. As a dog lover myself, I believe they are a blessing given to us. I can't help but think about the family that is being put at risk by irresponsible Leftist reporters. But I feel better knowing that this family is most likely surrounded by a pack of loyal Belgian Malinois that will never go down without a furious fight -- let's pray that never happens.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-351897-818523-4697935-ce251653be-6b489897fc)

So when President Trump told us of his fate, I was tearfully thankful. The ScumBagh was chased down a tunnel by our heroic dogs of war as he whimpered and cried, until, like the coward that he was, he blew himself up. The ScumBagh only killed himself and his own children --- so there was no martyrdom. Actually the opposite, as the Quran strictly forbids suicide. All of America should be thankful for President Trump's leadership and the professionalism of our fighting forces. But sadly that's not the case. Jeff Bezos' Washington Post published the headline referring to Baghdadi as an "austere religious scholar" in an attempt to glorify a demon. And this morning, the Washington Post , in a sick and unnecessary attempt to stir up controversy, pushed to release the identity of the war dog that was injured in the operation. As with any pedigree dog, they have a trackable lineage that's likely attached to a family in Germany or the Netherlands (where the vast majority of military working dogs are purchased) -- a family that now has to put themselves on high alert because a Leftist reporter in Washington wants to hand their identity over to terrorists. The Washington Post is nothing more than the American version of Pravda - but in service to socialism. I support President Trump's move to cancel all taxpayer dollars going to this publication and will do the same if elected to Congress. If a copy of the Washington Post were to end up in my Congressional office, I will literally file a complaint against Jeff Bezos for illegal dumping on public land. Because that's what I think of the Washington Post - it is trash. But first, . Thank you so much for all that you do. Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. As October comes to a close, we need to prove to the Washington Post and the rest of the Fake News media that my campaign has sustained support. . P.P.S. As a dog lover myself, I believe they are a blessing given to us. I can't help but think about the family that is being put at risk by irresponsible Leftist reporters. But I feel better knowing that this family is most likely surrounded by a pack of loyal Belgian Malinois that will never go down without a furious fight -- let's pray that never happens. name: Tracy Newman
subject: FWD: I'm pretty scared right now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
2016 taught us nothing is certain.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7382?t=3&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4) Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Jay's email, because there's so much at stake. Look, I'll just put it way more bluntly than the Governor did: You remember what happened the last time we took an election for granted? We just assumed that cooler, calmer heads would prevail, and we were wrong. Had we not taken anything for granted, we'd have someone very different leading our country right now. Politics is not what it once was. Today you have to be prepared for anything. Do you remember what happened when shadowy dark money groups poured millions into unfounded attacks? We simply cannot take this election for granted. We must be sure we have the resources to respond to the attacks we know are coming our way. **We cannot just assume the right thing will happen. We have to fight for it.** **[Thursday's deadline is part of that: Will you donate $1 or more to help us raise $25,000 by Thursday?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7382?t=4&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7383?t=5&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7384?t=6&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7385?t=7&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7386?t=8&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7387?t=9&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7388?t=10&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
Thanks,
Tracy
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Monday, Oct 28, 2019
Subject: I'm pretty scared right now
Friend,
Halloween is fast approaching, but it was last week's news that _really_ scared me.
Because of relentless attacks -- and millions of dollars spent -- by the Republican Governors Association, Louisiana Governor and fellow Democrat John Bel Edwards fell short of the majority vote he needed to win reelection outright. That race is now headed to a runoff next month, thanks to the RGA's massive investment in the race.
If you think Louisiana is the end, think again. **There are just three Democratic incumbents the RGA can target in 2020 -- I'm one of them.** Since 2018, they've raised almost $200 million, and they're itching to spend it against me, you can bet on that.
Grassroots donations from folks like you would go a long way right now in preparing for what's to come. **[We have a $25,000 goal to hit before Thursday's public end-of-month deadline -- will you donate $1 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7382?t=11&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7383?t=12&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7384?t=13&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7385?t=14&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7386?t=15&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7387?t=16&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7388?t=17&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---
A few weeks ago, Governor Edwards' reelection seemed almost written in stone. He's wildly popular in Louisiana -- but then the GOP turned up the heat -- and their relentless ads, deep pockets, and half-truths could mean a Republican governor in Louisiana.
That's why I say over and over: _Don't believe anyone who tells you this race is certain._
We should have learned after 2016 that nothing is certain. Make no mistake: While we're working to bring real progress to Washington state, Republicans are plotting. They have a plan to unseat me next year, and they could put that plan into motion at any moment. We have to be prepared -- that's why I'm asking you right now:
**[Will you donate $1 or more to help me fight back against Republican attacks, and keep fighting for progress as Washington's governor? We have a huge deadline coming up on Thursday, and your support really does make a world of difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7382?t=18&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7382?t=19&akid=7978%2E868730%2EIv7Mr4)
---

subject: Opening up our books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:

---
Friend, Last month, our campaign asked you to chip in before our quarterly filing deadline. And we were so humbled by the outpouring of support to help us get to our goal.**We know that every single contribution our supporters make is an investment in our movement.** So now I want to make sure you get to see the results: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5ZJ5Nw2EcUhH2dMGle0Iw-fDgpJC8hjU_Ezg4OwAPKE=/YQA3NQoR9P0IsotZQm1sh3teC2DaLKXzj-7xIBAtlmU=?refcode=20191029email_eoqreadout_nondonor&amount=22) **Last quarter alone we raised $350,815 thanks to our supporters in Texas and across the nation.** We were the #1 Democratic fundraiser and the #2 fundraiser overall in the race for Texas-22. And I'm especially proud of one stat you'll notice above: **Every single dollar we raised came from grassroots supporters!** In fact, we were #4 nationally in fundraising among campaigns that didn't have self-contributing candidates. [_**We couldn 't be more grateful for the excitement our supporters have shown for this campaign. Will you help power our movement by contributing $22 now? **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5ZJ5Nw2EcUhH2dMGle0Iw-fDgpJC8hjU_Ezg4OwAPKE=/YQA3NQoR9P0IsotZQm1sh3teC2DaLKXzj-7xIBAtlmU=?refcode=20191029email_eoqreadout_nondonor&amount=22) | **[DONATE $22 NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/5ZJ5Nw2EcUhH2dMGle0Iw-fDgpJC8hjU_Ezg4OwAPKE=/YQA3NQoR9P0IsotZQm1sh3teC2DaLKXzj-7xIBAtlmU=?refcode=20191029email_eoqreadout_nondonor&amount=22)**
---

Sri isn't a wealthy insider who can self-fund his own campaign and he's not taking a single dollar from corporate PACs. We're committed to creating a grassroots movement that's 100% people-powered -- the way elections should be run!
Last quarter we showed just how strong our grassroots army can be, but we also saw how much stronger we'll need to be if we're going to overcome wealthy special interests and flip this seat blue.
[_**Step up and donate $22 now to help us hit our next monthly goal and flip TX-22 BLUE! **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5ZJ5Nw2EcUhH2dMGle0Iw-fDgpJC8hjU_Ezg4OwAPKE=/YQA3NQoR9P0IsotZQm1sh3teC2DaLKXzj-7xIBAtlmU=?refcode=20191029email_eoqreadout_nondonor&amount=22)

clean_body: Friend, Last month, our campaign asked you to chip in before our quarterly filing deadline. And we were so humbled by the outpouring of support to help us get to our goal.We know that every single contribution our supporters make is an investment in our movement. So now I want to make sure you get to see the results: Last quarter alone we raised $350,815 thanks to our supporters in Texas and across the nation. We were the #1 Democratic fundraiser and the #2 fundraiser overall in the race for Texas-22. And I'm especially proud of one stat you'll notice above: Every single dollar we raised came from grassroots supporters! In fact, we were #4 nationally in fundraising among campaigns that didn't have self-contributing candidates. | Sri isn't a wealthy insider who can self-fund his own campaign and he's not taking a single dollar from corporate PACs. We're committed to creating a grassroots movement that's 100% people-powered -- the way elections should be run! Last quarter we showed just how strong our grassroots army can be, but we also saw how much stronger we'll need to be if we're going to overcome wealthy special interests and flip this seat blue. In gratitude, Will Washington Campaign Manager, Sri for Congress STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = = | Paid for by Sri for Congress. Sri for Congress PO Box 898 Sugar Land TX 77478 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to longer receive emails from us, please =.

body:
---
Peter --

When we started this journey, D.C. didn’t think a former baseball player named J.D. Scholten could beat a career politician like Steve King -- no matter what horrible, racist or misogynistic things he says or does.

Almost a year ago, we hoped to win -- and we nearly did it.

This time, we expect to win.

Even Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ blog says this “could be the end of the line for King.”

**_[But J.D. can’t do it alone. Peter, he needs grassroots supporters like YOU standing tall with him each month. That’s how we’ll have the resources to campaign across the 39 counties in Iowa’s 4th district. Chip in $5 or more before Thursday’s end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11338607/115324031/1796747094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmVmZDRlMi05MGZhLWU5MTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jzIRuN9r1TUgoMBkE68mJVatVGoZhCntKITILMPR5Sw=&refcode=em19_191029_eom2_l1)_**

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

To defeat her in 2020, We need to win here. If we are not successful, . Pelosi and her squad are already pushing forward on their first vote for their backroom impeachment investigation! Ohio cannot afford these policies that will bankrupt our future! Thank you, Mike Turner PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER 120 W.
