name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Are you going to vote this November?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, We're just about a year out from the 2020 election that will determine the future of the presidency, but many states and local communities will be voting this November on a range of positions that are just as important. Local and state governments have immense power over our everyday lives, from changing zoning and affordable housing laws to funding schools and road repairs. These elections are so often ignored and receive low voter turnout because they don't have flashy candidates and national press coverage. But these new state governments will be the ones to determine redistricting in 2020 and will impact more than a decade of state and national politics through that redistricting. [**Please sign this pledge and promise to vote in your November 2019 elections. We need as many Democrats as possible to turn out and vote now so that our local and state governments reflect our progressive values.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5c/6e9863e8/15fb558a/1db088f1/326212725/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/pledgetovote/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you! The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5c/6e9863e8/15fb558a/1db088f1/326212725/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/pledgetovote/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")
---
|

name: Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor
subject: One week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
We have an opportunity to flip the Virginia General Assembly for the first time in two decades.
| | | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d4/39260142/42498daa/6263947b/648691467/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")
---
Friends-- One week from today, Virginians will head to the polls to determine the course of our commonwealth for the next generation. Democrats have accomplished a lot over the last two years. But the most important work is ahead of us. With your help, we can pass common sense gun safety legislation, adequately fund our public schools, increase access to early childhood education, and give working families a pay raise. **[Please send a contribution of $25, $50, $100 or amount of your choice to help us secure a Democratic majority one week from today.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d4/39260142/42498daa/6263947b/648691467/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")** We can't let the Republicans hold control of the General Assembly and block our progress. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Khizr Khan asked. James Carville asked. Paul Begala asked. Deb Haaland asked. Now I'm asking again. [**_That 's how critical my dear friend Ben Ray's Senate race is. His end-of-month deadline is only 48 hours away and he still needs 1,585 gifts to WIN, oust Mitch McConnell, and flip the entire Senate. Can I count on your $5? >> _**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b2_Jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I'll keep it simple: If we don't win Ben Ray's Senate race, Democrats' chances of taking back the Senate all but disappear. And so do any hopes we have for universal health care, secure elections, and fair courts. **We have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to remove McConnell from power and elect a Senate worthy of the name.** But he and his obstructionist Senate won't go down without a fight. I can't overstate how high the stakes are for Ben Ray's end-of-month deadline in 48 hours. Can I count on you to rush $5 to WIN and defeat McConnell's Senate? | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b2_Jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b2_Jayapal_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****

Thank you,

Pramila
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317bf/452934180/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317bc/452934180/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317bd/452934180/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317b2/452934180/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317b3/452934180/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b455/18e32a7f/53922cdc/7b2317b0/452934180/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
Hi -- we emailed you yesterday because our October numbers are behind, and we fell short of the $6,500 we needed to pull in yesterday. Just look at this monthly tracker from ActBlue:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3db/2a380d31/3d51e695/f0ecf8/1843975149/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfQUIxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_AB1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

> [](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3db/2a380d31/3d51e695/f0ecf8/1843975149/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfQUIxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_AB1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")Contribute
**There are just a few days left in the month and we 're still hundreds of donations shy of where we were in September. [Senator Hassan needs your help -- will you please give $3 or more right now to help us make up ground?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3db/2a380d31/3d51e695/f0ecf8/1843975149/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfQUIxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_AB1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
New Hampshire is a top battleground state and since Maggie only won by a fraction of a percent, we've got to keep up with our fundraising. If we don't, Mitch McConnell and his far-right allies will swoop in and spend millions to buy this seat back for Republicans.
We'll be blunt: Maggie isn't relying on corporate special interests to bankroll her campaign. She's counting on folks like you giving what you can to emails like this one.
**This seat is extremely competitive so making up ground this month is imperative.[$3 or more from you -- today -- would go a really long way, so will you please click here to rush your gift?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3db/2a380d31/3d51e695/f0ecf9/1843975149/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwMjlfQUIxXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e201901029_AB1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**
Thank you!
Best,
Team Maggie

name: Natalie Montelongo - National Political Director
subject: Join Actress Justina Machado for a Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85a/3eb3e2fc/55e68e15/744db6e8/1295592047/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191029_em_adv_hq&source=20191029_em_adv_hq")
---
| | Hey y'all, As one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters, we want to **invite you to join a team-wide call with actress Justina Machado for an exclusive update on our campaign.** On **Thursday, October 31st, at 7:30 p.m. CT** , Justina Machado of One Day at a Time will join our Campaign Manager, Maya Rupert, and myself, to give you an update on our efforts to reach our $800,000 fundraising goal by October 31st. [Register Here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85a/3eb3e2fc/55e68e15/744db6d7/1295592047/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://zoom.us/meeting/register/81d65ecd68e0a9e74ac87b605f06faf5?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Register+Here&utm_campaign=20191029_em_adv_hq&source=20191029_em_adv_hq") In her role as Penelope Cruz on One Day at a Time, Justina brings stories about immigration, mental health, being a working single mother to a huge audience. The issues her show deals with are issues that affect so many of us every day, and we're so proud to have her in this fight with us. If you can't make it to the call, can we count on you today to help us reach our goal? Every dollar counts, and we need your help to keep Julian in this race. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc85a/3eb3e2fc/55e68e15/744db6df/1295592047/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=20191029_em_adv_hq&source=20191029_em_adv_hq"). name: Kristen Foca
subject: This sounds right to me...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Rep. Chris Smith has spent the past 40 years doing nothing in Congress. That doesn't seem like he's standing up for us.
|
---

| | Friends,

I'm working to elect Stephanie because she's a true champion for equal rights and has had a front row seat to see how good government can work for the people--**so she knows the difference between what 's right and what's wrong for the 4th District.** But while Stephanie spent her whole career working to lift people up, Rep. Chris Smith has spent almost 40 years doing nothing to improve the lives of New Jerseyans. **What 's wrong about Chris Smith's record:** ❌voted against reproductive rights and Violence Against Women Act ❌blocked U.S. aid to women and girls around the world ❌prevented LGBTQ+ folks from having equal representation under the law [**Rep. Chris Smith is wrong for this district. Can you stand up for what 's right and donate $10 to vote out Chris Smith?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff085/522d4087/7afd416d/4f3425d2/3037001467/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191029_em_nondonor&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Rep+Chris+Smith+is+wrong+for+this+distri&utm_campaign=20191029_em&source=20191029_em")
| **[Donate $10](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff085/522d4087/7afd416d/4f3425d0/3037001467/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191029_em_nondonor&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Donate+10&utm_campaign=20191029_em&source=20191029_em")**
---
Smith is known for not coming back to the district to face his constituents.
**Stephanie Schmid is the right candidate for this district; she 's:**
✅advocated for human & LGBTQ+ rights while at the State Department.
✅fought to protect and advance reproductive and human rights around the world.
✅led the effort to introduce the Reproductive Rights Are Human Rights Act in both the House and the Senate.
We should send people to Congress who have experience protecting our rights, advocating for sound foreign policy, and securing a government that is both by and for the people.
**[That sounds right to me, what about you? If you can, please donate $10 so we can bring leaders we deserve to Congress.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff085/522d4087/7afd416d/4f3425ce/3037001467/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=20191029_em_nondonor&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+That+sounds+right+to+me+what+about+you+I&utm_campaign=20191029_em&source=20191029_em") _Because it 's the right thing to do._**
Thanks for everything,
Kristen Foca
Deputy Campaign Manager
Stephanie Schmid for Congress

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

You might think I’m referring to the GDP of a developing country, or the price tag of an entire fleet of the Apache helicopters I flew in the Army...But no... ...That’s the outrageous fundraising number the Democrats are projected to hit by year’s end.While Democrats are preparing to unleash this $500,000,000 war chest to flip Texas and steal 2020,we’re still scrambling to raise another $7,326 to meet our October goal before the end-of-month deadline. body:

body:

| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
It seems like the liberal media is running out of things to go after me for. They just attacked me for being white, now they want to go after me for being a vocal supporter for President Trump, when in reality, I'm just trying to provide transparency to the American people.
A triggered Executive Producer from the Ellen Show took to Twitter yesterday to make a profane comment towards me. In case you missed it:

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Welcome to the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I know that campaigns are long and tough. They take determination, and honestly -- a LOT of coffee.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648908b9/7f51f7bc/4b21b5a5/4ef35d75/1965127933/VEsH/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I know that campaigns are long and tough. They take determination, and honestly -- a LOT of coffee.

But I'm ready. My whole life has been about breaking down barriers and fighting for something larger than myself. It's why I joined the Air Force, it's why I took on the government to open ground combat roles to women, and it's why I'm running to represent Texas in the U.S. Senate.

This fight won't be easy, but it is one we can win. In the last election, Texans came together and ROCKED the status quo. We built a movement. And now we're back to show Washington: **Texans don 't give up easy.**

I'm running to replace John Cornyn with a senator who'll fight for you.

Unlike John Cornyn, who has taken **millions** from corporate PACs, Texans deserve a senator who puts people first. We deserve a senator who'll defend our access to health care. A senator who'll fight for our veterans and families.

We can do this -- but only if we work together. Follow me on social media to show your support and to stay in the loop about our campaign: [**Like my Facebook Page**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648908b9/7f51f7bc/4b21b5a5/4ef35d74/1965127933/VEsE/?g= "https://www.facebook.com/MJforTexas/") [**Follow me on Twitter**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648908b9/7f51f7bc/4b21b5a5/4ef35d6b/1965127933/VEsF/?g= "https://twitter.com/mjhegar") [**Follow me on Instagram**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648908b9/7f51f7bc/4b21b5a5/4ef35d6a/1965127933/VEsC/?g= "https://www.instagram.com/mjfortexas") Welcome to the fight,
MJ [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648908b9/7f51f7bc/4b21b5a5/4ef35d69/1965127933/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2In0%3D/?g= "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-n?refcode=welc1_n_db__46__&amount=10")
---

|
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20James?=
subject: my friend David Perdue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bda5ee6614&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
**Business experience guiding job creation. **

_That’s what my friend David Perdue - a fellow outsider and businessman - has brought to Washington in the Senate. And it’s exactly this type of progress that I plan to continue if you send me to Washington as your next Senator._
---
| [Donate ANY amount to split your gift between David & me](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1b0d72d2a8&e=02cd889ad3 "Donate ANY amount to split your gift between David & me")
---
| Senator Perdue is holding the line in the Senate for our shared values at the time when they are being threatened most.

**With radical liberals in the House focused on petty political fights, we must protect our Senate majority in 2020 in order to continue to carry out the business of the people - the job we are elected to do in the first place.**

**Senator Perdue and I are focused on protecting and growing our Senate majority in order to expand the American economic prosperity we have seen over the past few years.**

2020 is a turning point in America, and expanding our majority with the leadership of business-savvy job creators like Senator Perdue and me is critical to ensuring our next American century continues – and basic American values are always protected.

_Faith, family, service before self – and growing our economy. That’s what Senator Perdue and I are focused on._

[**Today, I’m asking you to split a donation of any amount between Senator Perdue and me. Will you help us grow our Senate majority and create prosperity for the people, instead of wasting time on petty Washington political fights?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=015b91da16&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [HELP DAVID PERDUE & ME EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6e712f5f21&e=02cd889ad3 "HELP DAVID PERDUE & ME EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY")
---
| Thank you,
[](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=66be2c7a6c&e=02cd889ad3)
John James
---
|
---
| | | **PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=49faf6d51f&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
---
|
---
| PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
[Privacy Policy](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1bb3abe0a0&e=02cd889ad3)

Want to change how you receive these emails? body:

| Team: We'll be tallying our numbers soon to give Ed a report tomorrow morning, and we wanted to reach out one more time to ask for your help.

_**[Our critical end-of-month deadline is on October 31, and we have a massive goal of $35,000 to reach before then. Right now, we're below 50% of the way there. Will you chip in $27 or more to have Ed's back and keep him in the fight for us?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-october2019-weekly?refcode=EM-102919_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *
>
> Team,
>
> We have an early meeting with Ed tomorrow to update him on our progress for our October goal, and right now, we need to raise $35,000 before October 31.
>
> End-of-month goals are huge indicators of our grassroots strength. Hitting our deadline goal will show everyone that our people-powered movement for the fights we care about -- the Green New Deal, gun safety, reproductive freedom, immigrant rights, economic inequality -- is unstoppable.
>
> **And with Congressman Joe Kennedy III challenging Ed and his progressive agenda, we 're facing two opponents, and we can't fall short of this end-of-month goal.**

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Everyone’s waiting to see if Beto will make it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

The deadline to qualify for the next Democratic debate is November 13.
This is how close Beto is to reaching the final requirements for the
November debate.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41143?refcode=ema20191029-64362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=64362%2E444211%2EfaiVF_ ]Beto only needs 2 more polls!Last week, Amy Klobuchar got the final
polls she needs to join the debate stage, so now everyone is looking to
see whether Beto will be able to do it too. There are a couple more polls
coming out between now and the qualification deadline. So we need to start
investing money immediately into getting Beto the support he needs to
qualify.

We have a real chance to pull this off. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41143?refcode=ema20191029-64362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=64362%2E444211%2EfaiVF_ ]Will you chip in $3
now to help us get the resources we need to make sure Beto doesn’t miss
his first debate?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41143?refcode=ema20191029-64362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=64362%2E444211%2EfaiVF_ ]Contribute $3

This is the harsh reality we face.

If Beto doesn’t qualify for the November debate –– the media will declare
that Beto’s shot at winning the nomination is gone, Trump will try to
convince Democrats that fighting for what’s right isn’t worth the
political price, and our chance to connect with millions of new debate
viewers will be lost.

But if Beto qualifies for the November debate –– we can prove that our
grassroots movement is willing to fight every step of this race, make sure
Beto is back on the debate stage to lead the conversation on the issues we
care about most, and send a strong message to Trump & the NRA that their
attacks won’t work.

Whatever happens next, is completely up to what we do this week. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/41143?refcode=ema20191029-64362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=64362%2E444211%2EfaiVF_ ]One
of the most powerful ways you can help us at this critical time is to donate $3 or
anything you can spare so we have the resources to fight for Beto.

Candidates only have until one week before the debate to qualify. And we
won’t get a redo if we fall short.

–Team Beto

clean_body: [1]Beto for America The deadline to qualify for the next Democratic debate is November 13. This is how close Beto is to reaching the final requirements for the November debate. [ ]Beto only needs 2 more polls!Last week, Amy Klobuchar got the final polls she needs to join the debate stage, so now everyone is looking to see whether Beto will be able to do it too. There are a couple more polls coming out between now and the qualification deadline. So we need to start investing money immediately into getting Beto the support he needs to qualify. We have a real chance to pull this off. [ ]Will you chip in $3 now to help us get the resources we need to make sure Beto doesn’t miss his first debate? [ ]Contribute $3 This is the harsh reality we face. If Beto doesn’t qualify for the November debate –– the media will declare that Beto’s shot at winning the nomination is gone, Trump will try to convince Democrats that fighting for what’s right isn’t worth the political price, and our chance to connect with millions of new debate viewers will be lost. But if Beto qualifies for the November debate –– we can prove that our grassroots movement is willing to fight every step of this race, make sure Beto is back on the debate stage to lead the conversation on the issues we care about most, and send a strong message to Trump & the NRA that their attacks won’t work. Whatever happens next, is completely up to what we do this week. [ ]One of the most powerful ways you can help us at this critical time is to donate $3 or anything you can spare so we have the resources to fight for Beto. Candidates only have until one week before the debate to qualify. And we won’t get a redo if we fall short. –Team Beto [ ]Contribute Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Re: campaign memo from Dan Pfeiffer, former advisor to Barack Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:

Last month, Barack Obama's Former Senior Advisor, Dan Pfeiffer, published a campaign memo about our chances of flipping Arizona in 2020.

**In his memo, Pfeiffer made it clear, Arizona IS a battleground state in 2020 for the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives.**

_But he also confirmed what I have been telling you -- we will not win UNLESS we turnout new voters, especially here in Maricopa County! _

So in the spirit of Dan's memo, our campaign will be doing a FUNDRAISING BLITZ for the rest of October for our 2020 Turn-Out-The-Vote Fund to drive record turn out in Arizona in 2020.

[**Will you chip in to our VOTER TURNOUT FUNDRAISING BLITZ before Thursday 's deadline?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/t10ypKoPzX-Q62mthUm0Y2dkEC6Vmdv-Vwy9f5y0csY=/33MBTOuZzRZVvAUFu4SwpXCc1vwwEqz2XCPdk84Wcjg=?refcode=X_102819_EOM_A&amount=5&recurring=auto)

This is a grassroots-funded campaign, and while that means Elizabeth can't be bought by corporate interests, it also means that we need supporters like you to stay committed to this fight.

Your support helps make it possible for Elizabeth to keep talking with people across this country about what matters to them. That's how we're going to win -- person by person, town by town, state by state.

And you'll help empower Americans in every part of this country to join the fight and demand big, structural change. Because our government is leaving working people behind, benefiting a smaller and smaller slice of people at the top.

It's time we do something about it. And with your help, we can rewrite the rules of Washington to put working people first.

Because Elizabeth isn't catering to wealthy donors and corporate interests, you'll always know that a Warren administration will fight for you. **But it's only possible with grassroots donors like you. And right now, we're falling behind our fundraising targets.**

[**Please chip in today to help reach our end-of-month fundraising goal.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528cb7/45c30650/10054ce0b/66f2e3ef/233804384/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1LMkRGX0VPTV9TSE9fQ18yMDE5MTAyOV9WMVMyX1BfVDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK2DF_EOM_SHO_C_20191029_V1S2_P_T2")

body:
---
| | In case you missed it, we made an exciting endorsement: Voter Protection Project is proud to endorse Phil Arballo for Congress! Phil is running against Devin Nunes -- Trump's rubber stamp who seems to be followed everywhere he goes by corruption accusations, and is suing a COW on Twitter. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - name: Bill Weld
subject: I can’t believe I have to say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGF0BS2gs6SdVGuDLO5_tbMA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=1) Team — Honestly, I can’t believe I have to say this. Lt. Col. Alexander S. Vindman, the White House’s top Ukraine expert who testified today as part of the House’s impeachment inquiry, is an American patriot and a hero. **_And it’s a damn shame that some commentators have chosen to slander him._** Lt. Col. Vindman came to the United States as a child and served his country with honor, earning a Purple Heart during his service in the Army. Now as a member of the National Security Council (NSC), he continues his service to our country - when he felt that the national security interest of our country was put at risk by Donald Trump’s charades, he spoke out _, not once, but twice,_ to top lawyers at the NSC. Today, because Lt. Col. Vindman felt compelled to testify in front of House investigators, some talking heads on TV have decided to attack his motives. **“It seems very clear that he is incredibly concerned about Ukrainian defense. I don't know that he's concerned about American policy ... we all have an affinity to our homeland where we came from ... he has an affinity for the Ukraine.”** — Fmr. Republican Congressman Sean Duffy on CNN.**
**
**“You know, some people might call that espionage,"** — Fox News Commentator John Yoo when asked about Vindman’s actions on the NSC. Oh, and let’s not forget President Trump’s tweet about the occasion: [](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGF0BS2gs6SdVGuDLO5_tbMA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=2) Questioning the morals of a man who has served his country so honorably is downright shameful, and frankly, we should be ashamed that our political discourse has gone down this dangerous path. But that’s what we get in a country where our commander-in-chief uses the bully pulpit **to actually bully people.** Lt. Col. Vindman and our country deserve so much better than this, and it makes our mission that much more important. [**Can you help us rise to the occasion and restore dignity and sanity to our national dialogue so that patriots like Lt. Col. Vindman won’t have to endure having their good name slander by the worst our nation has to offer?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGF0BS2gs6SdVGuDLO5_tbMA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=3) | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGF0BS2gs6SdVGuDLO5_tbMA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=4)
---
Thank you,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=6) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191029_fr_s&n=7).

clean_body: | Team — Honestly, I can’t believe I have to say this. Lt. Col. Alexander S. Vindman, the White House’s top Ukraine expert who testified today as part of the House’s impeachment inquiry, is an American patriot and a hero. And it’s a damn shame that some commentators have chosen to slander him. Lt. Col. Vindman came to the United States as a child and served his country with honor, earning a Purple Heart during his service in the Army. Now as a member of the National Security Council (NSC), he continues his service to our country - when he felt that the national security interest of our country was put at risk by Donald Trump’s charades, he spoke out , not once, but twice, to top lawyers at the NSC. Today, because Lt. Col. Vindman felt compelled to testify in front of House investigators, some talking heads on TV have decided to attack his motives. “It seems very clear that he is incredibly concerned about Ukrainian defense. I don't know that he's concerned about American policy ... we all have an affinity to our homeland where we came from ... he has an affinity for the Ukraine.” — Fmr. Republican Congressman Sean Duffy on CNN. “You know, some people might call that espionage," — Fox News Commentator John Yoo when asked about Vindman’s actions on the NSC. Oh, and let’s not forget President Trump’s tweet about the occasion: Questioning the morals of a man who has served his country so honorably is downright shameful, and frankly, we should be ashamed that our political discourse has gone down this dangerous path. But that’s what we get in a country where our commander-in-chief uses the bully pulpit to actually bully people. Lt. Col. Vindman and our country deserve so much better than this, and it makes our mission that much more important. | | Thank you, Bill Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

subject: Are you getting our emails?

body:
The team noticed you haven't opened or engaged with one of our campaign updates in a while.
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164699/1e3760f0/69104861/5f7eccef/2648142004/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=header")
Hey Friend,
The team noticed you haven't opened or engaged with one of our campaign updates in a while.
Your time is valuable, so we're checking in to see if you still want to get updates from the campaign trail. **Let us know if you 're still with us in the fight to flip Montana blue by using the buttons below:**
[Keep Me Updated On The Campaign!](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164699/1e3760f0/69104861/5f7eccec/2648142004/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://www.facebook.com/WilmotCollinsforSenate/")

[Unsubscribe](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164699/1e3760f0/69104861/5f7ecced/2648142004/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
These updates are a direct link between Wilmot and his supporters like you. It allows us to make sure we're hitting the mark on what issues matter most to you, and for you to get a backstage glimpse into Wilmot's campaign. We believe in _transparency and accountability._
It's evident that Steve Daines most prioritizes his big oil and special interest backers.
But we prioritize **you.** The only way we can keep these campaign wheels spinning is with your continued support, input and engagement.
**If you are in this for the long haul, take 10 seconds right now to make sure your contact preferences are accurate and up to date!**
Thanks for being on Team Wilmot.
Best,
Wilmot HQ

Wilmot Collins is Montana's first black mayor, a 20+ year U.S. military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. As Montana's next Senator, Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, job creation and economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands.
[CONTRIBUTE HERE](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164699/1e3760f0/69104861/5f7eccea/2648142004/VEsC/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=1910-bio-box&recurring=auto")

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

subject: This is critical for Tina:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The path to victory for Democrats runs through Minnesota, and Tina is our best defense against letting Moody's forecast become a reality. Chip in now to help Tina meet her end-of-month deadline.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029eom1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | **BREAKING FROM CNBC: TRUMP PREDICTED TO WIN KEY SWING STATES**

The fight for our country is right here, Team.

Moody's Analytics just released their forecast, and it's not looking good:

Trump is campaigning from Dallas to Minneapolis, but this is where we stop him. **With your support today, we can fund the ground game that will take on the up to $30 MILLION he's planning to spend to try to turn Minnesota red.**

**We have two days left before our end-of-month deadline, and we still need to raise $7,114. Can you pitch in?**

**[We can't delay -- will you donate $10, $25, $50 or more now to meet our goals and stop Trump's path to victory?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029eom1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Trump and Tina's opponent are two of a kind, and they are going to work hand-in-hand in this election, so we need to be ready for whatever they do next. **This end-of-month deadline is critical for Tina, because she needs to be able to build a grassroots campaign across the state to get ahead of Republican attacks and protect this Senate seat.**

**[Our grassroots movement can stop Trump and the GOP from winning in Minnesota. Pitch in $10 right now to help Tina reach her $7,114 end-of-month goal.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191029eom1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b902fa/30fd46cd/32e4cff3/2354a45e/2038388283/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.10.29_e1_jkd_eom_all&source=em_fr_2019.10.29_e1_jkd_eom_all") Hey there --

I'm the only presidential candidate that has traveled to every single county in Iowa. I'm traveling all across the country to meet with people like you to have a real discussion about what policies would most impact you.

Here's what I'm seeing:

I'm seeing that people are sick and tired of the partisan bickering. I'm seeing frustration with the gridlock. And I'm seeing people ready to stand up and fight back.

And the truth is, I see that too. This country deserves a president who represents their values of hard work and honesty. That's what I intend to do as President. That's what my platform is all about. **But I need your help to spread our message. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: 2020 Senate Spotlight: North Carolina's a toss-up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Retaking the Senate in 2020 is absolutely necessary if we're going to undo the damage Trump has caused \-- and North Carolina is one of the key states that we NEED to win. In the 5 years GOP senator Thom Tillis has been in office, he's become known for his terrible voting record. He votes in line with Trump 93.5% of the time on issues like placing migrant families in jail and banning the use of federal funds for abortion-related healthcare. He's called the impeachment inquiry a "waste of resources" and repeated false White House talking points on the inquiry. Before saddling up with #MoscowMitch in the Senate, Tilis was North Carolina Speaker of the House and pushed through a voter I.D. law that blatantly and illegally targeted minority voters while shuttering polling places. The federal courts struck it down, but it's clear what Tillis and the GOP will do to hold onto power \-- and now Tillis has spent the last three years helping Trump rearrange the federal courts so their new voter suppression tactics can succeed. Fortunately, Democrat Cal Cunningham is generating a lot of buzz as a strong progressive voice who believes in countering climate change, defending reproductive rights, and expanding healthcare coverage \-- and he's building such a strong grassroots movement that political prognosticators have declared his race a "Toss-Up," despite running against an incumbent utilizing voter suppression tactics. We need to know what Democrats think about this race so we are ready for whatever the GOP throws at us in 2020: **Are you ready to flip North Carolina blue?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5e/6e9863e8/15f4361e/1db088ca/3434422711/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/kBrq6mEu") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5e/6e9863e8/15f4361e/1db088ca/3434422711/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/kBrq6mEu") Let's win this fight! -When Democrats Turn Out [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5e/6e9863e8/15f4361e/1db088c9/3434422711/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/calvthom-nd?refcode=OUT20191029c.ND-b&refcode2=qW4vfXcvgOK4jXRuPmHe")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc5e/6e9863e8/15f4361e/1db088c8/3434422711/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Last week, Mitch McConnell hosted a high-dollar dinner fundraiser for Susan Collins to thank her for promoting his agenda in Washington.
body:
It's everything people hate about politics.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7df/3978700629/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Last week, Mitch McConnell hosted a high-dollar dinner fundraiser for Susan Collins to thank her for promoting his agenda in Washington.**
[**Make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month deadline hits on Thursday as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' big-dollar, favor-returning fundraising -> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7de/3978700629/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-2-full")
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7de/3978700629/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-2-full")****
Friends,
**Last week, Susan Collins attended an intimate dinner gathering thrown in her honor by Mitch McConnell.**
The invite list? Their wealthy donors and PACs who donated over $10,000 to Collins' reelection campaign.
McConnell is rewarding Collins for being a reliable vote for his agenda in Washington in the form of giant campaign checks!
It's everything people hate about politics. And it's why we are funding our campaign differently -- powered by lots of people giving modest donations. But that means we have to ask:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month deadline hits on Thursday as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Susan Collins ' high-dollar, special interest, favor-returning fundraising?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7de/3978700629/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-2-full")
Susan Collins' campaign is bankrolled by big donors and corporate PACs. We saw that on her last fundraising report. But if we keep fighting, we're going to replace her with Sara Gideon, a real champion for working people.
All our best,
Team Gideon
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7de/3978700629/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMjktMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october-eom?refcode=em191029-2-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7dd/3978700629/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cc8/4bef7a87/6b311349/287fc7dc/3978700629/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

| | **[_I refuse to let these be the last 48 hours of my campaign. And the DNC just announced a new debate donor threshold that could give us INCREDIBLE momentum. I 'm asking for your immediate $5 in this do-or-die moment to meet my critical $800K goal and keep this movement funded. This is so important, your gift will be matched until my deadline. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?refcode=20191029_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I just made a tough and vulnerable announcement: I need to raise $800K by my End of Month Deadline in 48 hours -- or I will be forced out of this race. And the DNC just announced a new debate donor threshold that could give us incredible momentum. **But truthfully, I 'm worried it might not be enough to meet my do-or-die goal.** I've used every breath I have in this race fighting for you. Right now, I'm asking you to fight for me with $5: **Every generous gift will be matched until my 48-hour deadline** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc859/3eb3e2fc/55f06808/744db30a/2280467091/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/oct800?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191029_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs")**

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc859/3eb3e2fc/55f06808/744db373/2280467091/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc859/3eb3e2fc/55f06808/744db372/2280467091/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc859/3eb3e2fc/55f06808/744db371/2280467091/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

**[We're just $6,253 away from our end-of-month goal, and if everyone who opened this email just donated $10, we can hit that goal. body:

|
---
| | Derek,

Mark has been calling supporters who made contributions of $5, $10, or whatever they could afford, to say thank you for chipping in. We've seen a surge in grassroots contributions from folks like you, and that helped Mark hit a record-breaking fundraising goal for the most recent quarter. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d016/53d9897e/52009912/1c8908dc/1021210827/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMwNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donorcall?refcode=20191029nd__306__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
This grassroots support is absolutely crucial to keeping Virginia blue and beating Donald Trump in 2020, and we need to keep up the momentum as we head into this week's end-of-month fundraising deadline.

| Team, when we set our ambitious $175,000 Halloween goal earlier, we knew it would be hard to hit.

[But things aren't looking good today!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaeb3/134673f2/a3cd979/6997f4d7/2754693880/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-oct-goal?refcode=EM_FR_B1_102919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Hunt
subject: Lizzie Fletcher Votes For Fracking Ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Puts Pelosi and the Squad over 7th District voters

Friend,

Today, Lizzie Fletcher continued her streak of putting Nancy Pelosi and the Squad above her constituents in the 7th District. Fletcher voted with her radically liberal colleagues against legislation that would prevent future Presidents from banning fracking, a practice of economic significance to the oil and gas industry which employs thousands in the 7th District. In response to Fletcher’s betrayal of 7th District voters, Republican candidate and Iraq War veteran Wesley Hunt released the following statement.

“Our district relies on the energy industry, yet Lizzie Fletcher continues to vote with those trying to bring Houston to it’s knees. Her opposition to this legislation is just the latest in a long line of failures that includes failing to stand strong against the Green New Deal and fight for our energy jobs. Environmentalists in Washington may not rely on the energy industry to feed their children, pay their rent and send their kids to college, but middle-class citizens in Houston do. I’m sure her donors in California, New York and Washington are happy with this vote, but I can guarantee you that people in the 7th District are not.”

We need your help to take back the 7th District and elect Wesley to Congress. Are you with us?

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Puts Pelosi and the Squad over 7th District voters Friend, Today, Lizzie Fletcher continued her streak of putting Nancy Pelosi and the Squad above her constituents in the 7th District. Fletcher voted with her radically liberal colleagues against legislation that would prevent future Presidents from banning fracking, a practice of economic significance to the oil and gas industry which employs thousands in the 7th District. In response to Fletcher’s betrayal of 7th District voters, Republican candidate and Iraq War veteran Wesley Hunt released the following statement. “Our district relies on the energy industry, yet Lizzie Fletcher continues to vote with those trying to bring Houston to it’s knees. Her opposition to this legislation is just the latest in a long line of failures that includes failing to stand strong against the Green New Deal and fight for our energy jobs. Environmentalists in Washington may not rely on the energy industry to feed their children, pay their rent and send their kids to college, but middle-class citizens in Houston do. I’m sure her donors in California, New York and Washington are happy with this vote, but I can guarantee you that people in the 7th District are not.” We need your help to take back the 7th District and elect Wesley to Congress. Are you with us? Sincerely, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: We're taking it to the next level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390b47/55b66746/2c206317/80cc622/2228881290/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | It was basically a closet. The first few weeks of our Kennedy for Massachusetts operation took place in a 10 foot by 10 foot space with a couple of rickety folding tables, no windows, a printer from circa 1999, and one whiteboard filled with big ideas. The good news: We've finally moved into our (much bigger, somewhat cleaner) official HQ in Watertown! And we're having a party to welcome everyone on board. **[Will you chip in $3 to help us get ready? We are still building the largest, most energized grassroots team Massachusetts has seen, and need all the support to build and keep our volunteers running.](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/36390b47/55b66746/2c206317/80cc623/2228881290/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-29-hqnonlocal&recurring=1&amount=3")** We're so excited about the amount of people signing up to support Joe, and we are committed to making this HQ feel like home for every single one of them. It will be welcoming, inclusive, energetic -- and hopefully a lot of fun. You've heard Joe say it: Above all else, this campaign is about bringing people in, from the Berkshires to Boston. That's a lot of door-knocks, phone calls, rallies, conversations, debates, late nights, and hard work coming out of this new office. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: When we say ‘Hire American,’ we mean everyone!
body:
President Donald J. Trump joined the 2019 Second Step Presidential Justice Forum in South Carolina last Friday, where he accepted a prestigious honor. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f882a67f8b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 29, 2019
---
| | |
# **WATCH: When we say ‘Hire American,’ we mean everyone! **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b13d11d58d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Donald J. Trump** joined the 2019 Second Step Presidential Justice Forum in South Carolina last Friday, where he accepted a prestigious honor for his part in advocating for and signing the groundbreaking First Step Act.

**“After years of waiting,** we assembled a historic coalition . . . After all of the work and effort, we passed the bill and I proudly signed it into law — the most significant criminal justice reform in many generations.”

**Washington has** **a long track** **record** of broken promises to the American people, but few are more significant than its collective failure to reform our criminal justice system. Unlike career politicians, however, President Trump likes taking action—not sitting around, playing the blame game, and merely hoping for a change someday.

**“My goal** has been to give a voice to the voiceless and to make Washington see and hear those who have been made to feel silent and to feel invisible,” the President said. That vision includes ALL Americans, from struggling manufacturing workers in small towns to former prisoners who have been trapped in a cycle of unemployment and recidivism.

**Signed into law** in 2018**,** the FIRST STEP Act brought common-sense reforms that delivered fairer sentencing rules and helped former inmates successfully return to society.

**How did it happen?** Real presidential leadership, for one. “And we rallied activists, and faith leaders, and law enforcement, and lawmakers alike. We worked across party lines very strongly,” President Trump said. “The FIRST STEP Act proved that we can achieve amazing breakthroughs when we come together as a nation and we put the interests of our citizens before the interests of any political party.”

**What came next** was equally important. The Trump Economy has delivered better opportunities for millions of American workers, and former prisoners who turned their lives around should be no exception. “My administration is working vigorously to remove barriers to re-entry and to encourage second-chance hiring,” the President said.

**“When we say** ‘Hire American,’ we mean all Americans. Every single American.”

**The President** is backing up those words with action across his Administration. The Department of Education is expanding an initiative that allows individuals in prison to receive Pell Grants to better prepare themselves for the workforce. The Department of Justice and Bureau of Prisons launched a new “Ready to Work” initiative to help connect employers directly with former prisoners, and the Labor Department awarded $2.2 million to states to expand bonds that support companies hiring former inmates.

**“After decades** of bitter disappointments and betrayals from Washington . . . my Administration is making a decisive break with the failures of the past,” he said.

**“We’re keeping our promises.** We’re solving problems, righting wrongs, and boldly confronting injustices—wherever and whenever we find them.”

[Unlike past leaders, President Trump delivered real justice reform.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef01f3ef52&e=3ee4985eea)

**Read** : [The President’s full remarks at the Second Step forum](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cad5fac597&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo participated in a meeting of the President's Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons (PITF)** | October 29, 2019
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad88498274&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e00c3d5b71&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=db1b46cfdb)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The Trump Economy has delivered better opportunities for millions of American workers, and former prisoners who turned their lives around should be no exception. “My administration is working vigorously to remove barriers to re-entry and to encourage second-chance hiring,” the President said. “When we say ‘Hire American,’ we mean all Americans. Every single American.” The President is backing up those words with action across his Administration. The Department of Education is expanding an initiative that allows individuals in prison to receive Pell Grants to better prepare themselves for the workforce. The Department of Justice and Bureau of Prisons launched a new “Ready to Work” initiative to help connect employers directly with former prisoners, and the Labor Department awarded $2.2 million to states to expand bonds that support companies hiring former inmates. “After decades of bitter disappointments and betrayals from Washington . . . my Administration is making a decisive break with the failures of the past,” he said. “We’re keeping our promises. We’re solving problems, righting wrongs, and boldly confronting injustices—wherever and whenever we find them.” Read : | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks | Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo participated in a meeting of the President's Interagency Task Force to Monitor and Combat Trafficking in Persons (PITF) | October 29, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

Friend, if your name isn’t on the list yet, you’ll have to act quickly – I told him I would give him an update at the end of the day today. Your tripled gift can really put a dent in Nancy Pelosi’s plans! ** The fate of our nation rests in your donation. Make it count, friend. John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc.

name: Stefanie Conahan
subject: Spotlight: Universal background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | [](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Friends,

The House passed a universal background checks bill 244 days ago.

In those 244 days, El Paso and Virginia Beach experienced two of the deadliest mass shootings in our country's history. Just this weekend, two people were shot and killed at a homecoming party near Texas A&M University-Commerce.

Countless lives lost, futures cut short, communities ravaged. **And while Mitch McConnell has had 244 days to bring background checks up for a vote in the Senate, he has done absolutely nothing.**

This week, we're focusing our Off the Sidelines Spotlight on the fight for meaningful gun safety reforms and how we can hold our elected officials accountable.

Thank you,
Stefanie

---
| Gun violence in America is an epidemic. According to the [Giffords Law Center](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0):
* The U.S. **gun suicide rate is 10 times higher** than that of other high-income countries

* The US. **gun homicide rate is 25 times higher** than that of other high-income countries

* Firearms are the second leading cause of death for American children and teens and **the first leading cause of death for black children and teens**

* ****Women in the U.S. are 21 times more likely to be killed with a gun**** than women in other high-income countries

Earlier this year, the House passed HR 8, the Bipartisan Background Checks Act, which would have closed the federal loophole that allows felons, domestic abusers, fugitives and other prohibited purchasers from buying guns from unlicensed sellers without a background check.

Despite an August [poll](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) that found that more than 90 percent of Americans--regardless of party affiliation--support universal background checks, **Mitch McConnell refuses to bring the bill up for a simple yes/no vote in the Senate.******

---
| **READ** | Everytown for Gun Safety's [fact sheet](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) on the power of background checks to save lives
**WATCH** | [MSNBC's profile](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) of Rep. Lucy McBath, who ran for Congress in 2018 after losing her son, Jordan, to gun violence
**READ** | This [article](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) about how guns and domestic violence are much more lethal for women of color
**READ** | Rep. Ann Kirkpatrick's [powerful op-ed](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) about the gun lobby's chokehold on Congress
**LISTEN** | To this [five-part podcast](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) from Vermont Public Radio on how a Republican governor in a rural state changed his mind on gun laws

---
| [58 percent of American adults](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0), or someone they care for, have experienced gun violence in their lifetime--and unless Congress takes action, that number will continue to rise:
**Call on Mitch McConnell to allow the Senate to vote on the Bipartisan Background Checks Act and enact common sense gun safety reforms.**************
You can also get more involved in the fight to end gun violence through one of the many organizations working on the front lines. Here are just a few:********
* [**Everytown for Gun Safety '**s action center](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) has a host of resources for those looking to get more involved in the fight for common sense gun safety reforms, including upcoming events with **Moms Demand Action**.

* Students can [join or start a **March For Our Lives** club](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) in their school or community and build on the Parkland students' movement.

* Check out the **Giffords Law Center** 's [Gun Law Scorecard](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to see how your state's gun laws stack up.

********
---
| | [DONATE](http://links.mail5.spopessentials5.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjIzNDA2NjIS1&r=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&b=0&j=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
|
---
| Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
---

Off the Sidelines PAC does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs._

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Kirsten altogether, [click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages05.net/gfppcinc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=22340662&spUserID=NTcyMjY0MzQ5NDY4S0&spJobID=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2&spReportId=MTYwMTc5OTIwNgS2).
---
